title: Sour Crispy Italian Lentil Stir-fry
description: A comforting and sour Italian dish featuring tender brown lentils, deglazed with a tangy sauce for extra flavor, and served as a side or light meal.

ingredients.name: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Rinse the lentils and pick out any debris. Add them to a large pot with enough water (about 10 cups) to cover. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until tender, about 45 minutes.
Drain the lentils, reserving some of their cooking liquid for later. Pat dry with paper towels.
In a separate pan over medium-high heat, combine the flour and olive oil. Stir until a light golden crust forms on the bottom of the pan (about 2-3 minutes).
Add the minced garlic to the flour mixture. Cook for an additional minute before removing from heat. Add in lemon juice and lime juice.
Gradually stir in apple cider vinegar, ensuring there are no lumps. Slowly add reserved lentil cooking liquid, stirring continuously to prevent sticking.
Season with salt and pepper. Mix well until the lentils are evenly coated with the tangy sauce. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve hot as a side dish or use as a light meal base.
